description: Implement and verify the consolidated result of the completed Codex/Fable proposal-review loop.

prompts.rielaPromptTemplate: Implement the already-reviewed consolidated plan, verify it with real host and Docker data, and loop only on concrete final-review defects.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Work only in the requested repository. Never print credentials, private keys, or raw usage events. Do not stage, commit, or push. Return concise evidence JSON.

steps.description: Implement the consolidated accepted design and any concrete findings from a prior final review.
Run code checks and exact real host/Docker verification.
Review only concrete implementation or verification defects.
